name: Slumbering Rose
description: A special drink with a laid-back vibe. This is a masterpiece that was crafted for Lisa with "Snow-Kissed Dawn" serving as the creative inspiration when The Honorary Knight's Cocktail Shack was in operation.\nAfter a long day, the librarian needs to recharge without risking sleeplessness. In making this drink, you skipped any stimulating ingredients and found a delicate balance between the sweetness of caramel and a gentle tang.\nAs the goal was "peaceful, restful sleep," you proposed the name "Slumbering Rose" for this drink, a proposal that met with Lisa's enthusiastic approval.
